MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 212

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SANCTION ORDER ISSUED ON 10/18/2004 TO MARILYN RAIA, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. Mtn For Reconsideration Of Sanction Order
Off Calendar Dec-07-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Sanction Order issued on 10/18/2004 to Marilyn Raia, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, for failure to appear is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
